definition.en: A state of dissociation is a state of dissociation, and this must be kept in mind. There is however a distinction here which he is already beginning to recognize. It is simply that he becomes vulnerable, or more sensitive, to inner data in a dissociated state, regardless of what causes the state to come about.
definition.zh: 解离状态就是解离状态，这一点必须牢记。然而，这里有一个他已经开始认识到的区别。简单来说，就是无论解离状态是由什么原因引起的，他在这种状态下都会变得脆弱，或者说对内层数据更加敏感。

definition.en: The waking state, as I have said often, is as much a trance state as any other state. Here we merely switch the focus of attention to other channels. All that is required is that we switch the attention... consider merely that all types of awareness are trance states... consciousness is the direction in which the self looks.
definition.zh: 我常说的，清醒状态和其他任何状态一样，都是一种出神状态。在这里，我们只是将注意力的焦点切换到其他通道。所需要的只是我们转换注意力……只需考虑所有类型的觉知都是出神状态……意识是自我注视的方向。

definition.en: The idea of dissociation could be likened to the slight distance between the bark and the inside of the tree. Here we do not have a rigid bark, as you should not have a rigid ego. We have instead a flexible bark, changing with the elements, protecting the inner tree or the inner self, but flexible, opening up or closing in rhythmic motion. The bark is so to speak outside our tree; and there is a small space between the inner tree and the bark. This small space is our dissociation.
definition.zh: 解离的概念可以比作树皮和树内部之间的微小距离。这里我们没有僵硬的树皮，正如你不应该有一个僵硬的自我。我们反而有一个灵活的树皮，随环境而变化，保护着内在的树或内在自我，但它是灵活的，以有节奏的运动张开或闭合。树皮可以说是我们这棵树的外部；而在内在的树与树皮之间有一个小空间。这个小空间就是我们的解离。

definition.en: By adulthood the trance, the intense focus, is most strongly upon him. It is after this period that the trance little by little weakens its hold. By the period you call old age the inner attention is already escaping. The strong focus of psychic energy needed to maintain the splendid physical image-organization is no longer given.
definition.zh: 到成年期，出神状态，即强烈的专注，对他最为强烈。正是在这个时期之后，出神状态才逐渐减弱其控制。到你称为老年的时期，内在注意力已经在逃逸。维持那辉煌的物理形象组织所需的灵性能量的强烈专注不再被给予。

explanation:
解离或出神状态，是意识聚焦方向的一种特殊形式。在这种状态下，个体的注意力完全集中在某个特定领域，而对周围环境和其他感知层面暂时失去觉察。这并非异常现象，因为任何意识本质上都只是自我观察的方向——你日常的清醒意识本身也是一种出神状态，就像被催眠的受试者一样，难以相信自己看不见的事物存在。

在深层出神中，个体在过程中完全知晓正在发生什么，但事后却无法回忆。这种状态类似于植物的觉知：植物像深层出神中的受试者一样具有意识，只是其其他能力暂时潜伏未用。出神状态允许创造力以惊人速度展现，因为意识被高度聚焦，排除了日常干扰。解离程度越深，个体越能脱离常规自我，进入更广阔的觉知领域，

quotes.text: The awareness of plant life lies along these lines. In a deep trance there is oblivion afterward, that is the subject though fully aware of what is going on while in deep trance, can remember nothing of it afterward. The awareness of plant life is also like the awareness of a subject in deep trance. Except for the suggestion and stimulus received by regular natural forces on your plane, the plant life does not bestir itself in other directions. But like the subject in trance, our plant is aware. Its other abilities lie unused for the time and latent, but they are present.
quotes.translation: 植物生命的意识遵循这些路线。在深度出神状态下，事后会有遗忘，也就是说，虽然主体在深度出神时完全意识到正在发生的事情，但事后却什么也记不住。植物生命的意识也类似于深度出神状态下的主体意识。除了你们层面上常规自然力量所给予的暗示和刺激外，植物生命不会在其他方向上活跃起来。但就像出神状态下的主体一样，我们的植物是有意识的。它的其他能力暂时未被使用而处于潜伏状态，但它们确实存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Your attentions are indeed focused elsewhere. You are in a trance as well as Ruburt is in a trance state now. This is far from unusual. I use you, dear Doctor Instream, only as an example. Consciousness of any kind is merely the direction in which the self looks. I told you this at our brief meeting. Consciousness is the focus, the direction of focus. Your ordinary consciousness is as much a trance state as any trance state induced through hypnotism. Therefore it is nearly impossible to convince a subject in trance that something he does not see exists.
quotes.translation: 你们的注意力确实集中在别处。你们也处于出神状态，就像鲁柏现在处于出神状态一样。这绝非罕见。我以你，亲爱的英斯特里姆博士，仅作为例子。任何形式的意识都只是自我注视的方向。我在我们简短的会面中告诉过你这一点。意识是焦点，是聚焦的方向。你们普通的意识与通过催眠诱导的任何出神状态一样，都是一种出神状态。因此，几乎不可能说服一个处于出神状态的主体相信他看不到的东西是存在的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The human is not innately limited... the waking state, as I have said often, is as much a trance state as any other state. Here we merely switch the focus of attention to other channels. All that is required is that we switch the attention... consider merely that all types of awareness are trance states... consciousness is the direction in which the self looks.
quotes.translation: 人类并非天生受限……清醒状态，正如我常说的，和其他任何状态一样，都是一种出神状态。这里我们只是将注意力焦点切换到其他通道。所需要做的就是切换注意力……只需考虑所有类型的觉知都是出神状态……意识是自我注视的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Your own subconscious is the fountain of your individuality and personality. From it springs your talent. When the ego becomes too concerned with daily matters, with worry in other words, then the works of the tool become clogged. It becomes ineffective. Dissociation, and I will give you many ways of achieving it, unclogs the tool and is absolutely necessary. The freely working subconscious, or the inner you, is completely capable of taking care of all practical considerations, and will use the ego as a tool to see that this is done.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的潜意识是个性与人格的源泉。你们的天赋从中涌现。当自我过于关注日常事务，换句话说，过于担忧时，工具的工作就会堵塞。它会变得无效。解离——我会给你们许多实现它的方法——能疏通工具，并且是绝对必要的。自由运作的潜意识，或内在的自己，完全有能力处理所有实际考量，并会利用自我作为工具来确保这一点得以实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Benefits received by personalities who are in deep trance are not nearly as long-lasting as they are in my method. It is true that in the trance state the subconscious learns. However, the subconscious knowledge eventually must be transferred to the personality-consciousness. In other methods than my own this transference takes place at a later time, usually on a midplane after the death of the personality on your plane.
quotes.translation: 深度出神状态下人格所获得的益处，远不如用我的方法所获得的持久。确实，在出神状态中，潜意识会学习。然而，潜意识知识最终必须转移到人格意识中。在我方法之外的其他方法中，这种转移发生在较晚的时候，通常是在你们层面的人格死亡后的中间层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In trance states, there is a more or less stationary system waiting, so to speak. In trance states, consciousness itself brings about the chemical changes within it as it, consciousness, travels. Changes do occur within the body. When consciousness alters its direction it automatically alters the physical system. When it is ready to return the physical system is automatically prepared to receive it.
quotes.translation: 在出神状态中，可以说存在一个或多或少静止的系统在等待。在出神状态中，意识本身在其旅行过程中引发内在的化学变化。身体内部确实会发生改变。当意识改变方向时，它会自动改变物质系统。当它准备返回时，物质系统也会自动准备好接收它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: At times the ego can hold you in a tight vice, which the dissociation breaks. This is what happened after your exercises. You have been doing very well, for you, in allowing yourself psychic freedom. However conscious fears cause the ego to tighten its grasp and some effects of this nature were starting up again. This is why I suggested that you begin these exercises now. The fact that the fearful ego was beginning to tighten explains your reaction to the exercises. The ego can build up around the subconscious vitality like a glacier, and these exercises melt it away. Even the prickles in your neck are like tiny picks chipping away at icy fears.
quotes.translation: 有时自我会像紧钳般束缚你，而出神状态能打破这种束缚。这就是你练习后发生的情况。就你而言，你在允许自己获得心灵自由方面做得很好。然而有意识的恐惧会导致自我收紧掌控，这类性质的某些影响又开始显现。这就是我建议你现在开始这些练习的原因。恐惧的自我开始收紧这一事实，解释了你对练习的反应。自我可以像冰川一样堆积在潜意识活力周围，而这些练习能将其融化。就连你脖子上的刺痛感，也像细小的冰镐在敲碎冰封的恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Hypnotism will be necessary, however, only for a time, and only to induce the light trance state. In the light trance state, the inner self is free from the camouflage nature of your plane, and the truly humorous aspect is this: Only by freeing yourself from your own camouflage universe can you see it clearly, understand it for what it is, and actually learn to use it for mankind's best advantage.
quotes.translation: 催眠术仅在一段时间内是必要的，且仅用于诱导浅层出神状态。在浅层出神状态中，内在自我得以摆脱你们层面的伪装本质，而真正幽默之处在于：唯有摆脱自身的伪装宇宙，你才能看清它、理解其本质，并真正学会如何为人类最大利益运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now unconsciously you do many of these things. You often go back in time, so to speak, and "relive" a particular event so that it has a different ending, or say things that you wish you had said. A knowledge of one state of consciousness can help you in other states. In a light trance the meaning of dream symbols will be given if you ask for them. The symbols may then be used as methods of suggestion that will be tailored for you personally. If you discover, say, that a fountain in a dream represents refreshment, then when you are tired or depressed, think of a fountain. In another layer of reality, of course, you will be creating one.
quotes.translation: 你们在无意识中常行此类事。可以说，你们常回溯时光，"重历"某个事件使其拥有不同结局，或说出你们希望曾说过的话。对某一意识状态的认识，能助你进入其他状态。在轻度出神状态下，若你主动求取，梦象征的意义便会显现。这些象征可被用作量身定制的暗示方法。比如，若你发现梦中喷泉代表焕然一新，那么当你疲惫或沮丧时，便可观想喷泉。在实相的另一层面，你自会创造一座喷泉。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The eyes muscles are not used, the normal muscular activity that usually occurs in sleep vanishes. The physical body is in a deep trance state. The trance may be masked also by sleep, if the projection occurs from a dream state. According to the intensity of the projection and according to the systems visited, the physical body becomes more or less rigid when consciousness returns to it.
quotes.translation: 眼部肌肉未被使用，睡眠时通常出现的正常肌肉活动消失。肉体处于深度出神状态。若投射源自梦境状态，出神状态也可能被睡眠掩盖。根据投射强度及所探访系统的不同，当意识回归肉体时，肉体将呈现不同程度的僵直状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Autohypnosis then will be utilized in an effort to discover what experiences are common in various levels or trance states, and these shall be examined in a search for primary and secondary conditions. These experiments however are for the future. Some of the data I will give you as a guide, but much you shall do on your own. There is no way to probe the realities of consciousness except that a personality travels through all levels of consciousness open to him, and do so in such a way that he can retain and apply the information that he receives in these inner travels.
quotes.translation: 随后将运用自我催眠来探索不同层次或出神状态中的共通经验，并以此检视初级与次级条件。这些实验尚属未来之事。我会提供部分数据作为指引，但更多内容需由你们自行探索。除非人格能遍历自身可及的所有意识层次，并以能保留并运用内在旅程中所获信息的方式完成探索，否则绝无可能深入意识实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The symptoms of such a semi trance state include the sleepiness and drugged feeling with which he was afflicted; though these were only mildly disagreeable, they should be taken as signs that orientation is inefficient. The lightness of the hands is another such symptom. That is, these symptoms, noticed when the individual is supposed to be going about his normal physically-oriented day, can then be taken as a sign that the personality does not have all of his energies properly directed for the case at hand.
quotes.translation: 这种半出神状态的症状包括他所遭受的困倦和药物般的感觉；虽然这些不适感尚属轻微，但应被视为定向效率低下的信号。双手的轻盈感是另一个此类症状。也就是说，当个体本应正常进行以物质为导向的日常活动时，若注意到这些症状，便可视为人格并未将所有能量适当导向当前事务的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Let us first consider the trance state. Let us for example consider the following circumstances, which are happening only in our imagination. We will therefore consider this imaginary circumstance: an individual is in a trance state. His focus of attention is rather severely limited in some aspects, and yet in other ways it is very strongly focused.
quotes.translation: 让我们首先探讨出神状态。举例来说，请考虑以下仅存在于我们想象中的情境。因此我们将设想这个虚构情境：一个人处于出神状态。他的注意力焦点在某些方面受到相当严格的限制，然而在其他方面却又高度集中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Because his range was so large, your dissociated conditions simply met more easily than otherwise. However, once his attention was centered here, he turned his conscious attention to full focus upon what he perceived. Nor did he perceive your physical form as you know it. But he picked up fully your emotional recognition and fear, and these were translated or perceived by him in his own fashion, so that to him you appeared as a mass of varying colors, and as movement of severe intensity.
quotes.translation: 由于他的感知范围如此广阔，你的解离状态反而比正常情况下更容易被触及。然而，当他的注意力集中于此地时，他便将全部意识聚焦于所感知的事物。他感知到的并非你认知中的物质形态，而是完全捕捉到了你的情绪认知与恐惧——这些情绪以他独有的方式被转化或感知，因此在他眼中，你呈现为一片流动的斑斓色彩，以及剧烈动荡的能量运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The semitrance state does not allow a clear awareness in either world. It is passed through very quickly as a rule, both on the way into a trance and on the way out of one. It is of course a part of both realities. This goes without saying. It is true that there is much this evening that could be added to our previous discussions, but Ruburt, particularly after last nights session, should rest. And I would also suggest that he forget his psychological time experiments until next Monday.
quotes.translation: 半出神状态无法让任何一方世界保持清晰觉知。通常进入与离开出神状态时都会快速通过这个阶段。它自然属于两种实相的一部分。今晚确实有许多内容可以补充我们之前的讨论，但鲁柏——尤其在昨晚课程之后——应当休息。我也建议他将心理时间实验暂停到下周一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Joseph's are closer at hand, and therefore it is necessary that you both learn the best way to handle that situation. Dissociation will help particularly in Ruburt's case, since already it is being practiced and can be relied upon to some extent. It is also easier for Ruburt to practice dissociation since it is Joseph's parents who are involved.
quotes.translation: 约瑟的亲人近在咫尺，因此你们必须学会处理这种情况的最佳方式。解离状态对鲁柏尤其有帮助，因为他已在练习这种状态，且能在一定程度上依赖它。由于涉及的是约瑟的父母，鲁柏练习解离也更为容易。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: On occasion he is in somewhat deeper a trance state, and our results are better, but this does not teach him what I want him to learn. The light trance state is ideal for my purposes. For with this training he will be able to give specific information, but he will also have some knowledge of how this comes about. Do you have any more questions?
quotes.translation: 有时他会进入较深的出神状态，我们的成果会更理想，但这并不能让他学到我想教给他的东西。浅层出神状态最符合我的目的。因为通过这种训练，他既能提供具体信息，也能对信息如何产生有所认知。你还有其他问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If someone is caught in a natural disaster, the following questions might be asked: "Am I being punished by God, and for what reason? Is the disaster the result of God's vengeance?" A scientist might ask instead: "With better technology and information, could we somehow have predicted the disaster, and saved many lives?" He might try to dissociate himself from emotion, and to see the disaster simply as the result of a nonpersonal nature that did not know or care what lay in its path.
quotes.translation: 若有人遭遇自然灾害，可能会问："我是否在受上帝惩罚？为何受罚？这场灾难是上帝报复的结果吗？"科学家或许会问："凭借更先进的技术和信息，我们能否提前预测灾难，拯救更多生命？"他可能试图与情绪解离，将灾难视为无觉知、无悲悯的非人格自然法则的结果。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: I did suggest that for the present you trust Ruburt's intuitions in the matter of your parents while you caught up with the technique of dissociation. There is no need for you to follow Ruburt's lead in all directions. I merely want you to examine your own ideas as to what is practical, because often your ideas have been practical for the short term only, and in many cases though not all Ruburt's seemingly unpractical notions have been based on very practical psychological knowledge.
quotes.translation: 我曾建议你在尚未掌握解离技巧前，暂先信任鲁柏对你父母问题的直觉。你无需在所有方面都追随鲁柏的引导。我只希望你能审视自己对"务实"的定义——因为你的务实观念往往只适用于短期，而鲁柏那些看似不切实际的想法（虽非全部）却常建立在非常务实的心理学知识基础上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In the past you did not understand properly this relationship. You understood the destructive tendencies but you placed them in the subconscious. The endless or seemingly endless circle need not occur now, or in the future. This dissociation of which Ruburt has spoken to you is an excellent discipline that will insure your use of energy in the best possible manner. I am not suggesting that the ego be ignored in any manner, merely that the tool is not allowed to become the master.
quotes.translation: 过去你们未能正确理解这种关系。你们虽然理解了破坏性倾向，却将其归入潜意识层面。这个无尽或看似无尽的循环，现在或未来都不必再发生。鲁柏向你们提及的这种出神状态，是一种绝佳的修行方法，能确保你们以最佳方式运用能量。我并非建议以任何方式忽视自我，只是提醒不要让工具成为主人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you are speaking. Ruburt switches another channel on, through which my essence can enter more readily. There is the problem here of my entry also into your conscious minds. This does certainly involve a looking inward on Ruburt's part, but it is not self-hypnosis in the terms usually spoken of, merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus in much the same manner that you focus upon an outside camouflage stimulus.
quotes.translation: 我并非以你们所说的那种方式引发出神状态。鲁柏开启了另一个频道，使我的本质能更顺畅地进入。这里存在一个我同时进入你们意识心智的问题。这确实涉及鲁柏对内在的观照，但并非通常所说的自我催眠，只是聚焦于内在客观刺激，如同你们聚焦于外在伪装刺激一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: There is much here to be studied about personality. From your viewpoint the information available to you can be practically endless. There is much to be learned about perceiving other realities. Trance states are only a beginning. The self is made of action. Teaching the self to expand is most important, and the ways are nor difficult... this is what makes the experiment interesting. This is not beyond human abilities. The structure of the personality makes this possible.
quotes.translation: 关于人格，这里有许多值得研究之处。从你们的视角来看，你们可获得的信息几乎是无穷无尽的。关于感知其他实相，还有许多需要学习。出神状态仅仅是一个开端。自己是由行动构成的。教导自己去扩展是最重要的，而且方法并不困难……这正是让实验变得有趣的地方。这并未超出人类的能力范围。人格的结构使这成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt uses dissociation in order to free his abilities so that they may be used more effectively. The telepathy occurrence with your witness is an example. However it is also true that this opening allows me entry. Joseph, you will find that your experiences with the inner senses occur often at split moments of dissociation.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏利用出神状态来解放他的能力，使其能更有效地发挥。与你们见证人发生的通心感应事件便是一个例子。但同样真实的是，这种开放也让我得以进入。约瑟，你会发现你与内在感官的体验往往发生在出神状态的瞬间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Any gap of assimilation here can be most unfortunate, and sometimes disastrous. Consciousness of self, if you recall, is self-consciousness that still retains self as a part of action, self that perceives its existence within action. Ego, originally a part of this consciousness of self, splits off as previously explained, and attempts to dissociate itself from action, indeed to view action as a result of itself; that is, to view action as a result and not a cause.
quotes.translation: 此处任何同化上的断裂都可能极为不幸，有时甚至带来灾难。自我意识，若你记得，是仍将自我视为行动一部分的自觉意识，是感知自身存在于行动中的自我。原本作为自我意识一部分的自我，如先前所述分裂开来，试图与行动分离，甚至将行动视为自身的结果；也就是说，将行动视为结果而非原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is very much concerning the characteristics of the trance state which you do not yet understand, and I can help you here. Hypnotism may seem very strange. It involves no more, however, than a study of human personality, for it involves nothing more than a switching of focus. It is imperative, if we are to speak easily, that you read the material having to do with the specific ways in which the human individual creates physical matter on a subconscious basis.
quotes.translation: 关于出神状态的特征，你们还有许多尚未理解之处，我在此可以协助。催眠术看似十分奇特，然而它不过涉及对人类人格的研究，因为它仅涉及焦点的切换。若我们要顺畅地讨论，你必须阅读关于人类个体如何在潜意识基础上创造具体物质的相关资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt may feel betwixt and between, as indeed at times he is, but only occasionally. We must have some experiments to progress. It seems that we should supplement our lectures, at least now and then. Also, if Ruburt is experimenting as he is with the trance state in psychological time experiments, it is a good idea that some of this experimentation be carried on by him under our excellent supervision; and after consideration I think that you will agree.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏可能会感到无所适从，事实上他有时确实如此，但只是偶尔。我们必须进行一些实验才能进步。看来我们应该补充我们的讲座，至少时不时地。此外，如果鲁柏像在心理时间实验中那样尝试恍惚状态，那么让他在我们出色的监督下进行一些这样的实验是个好主意；经过考虑，我想你会同意的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I am going to suggest that our friend take a walk when we are finished here, a brisk one. The situation is in no way alarming. He has been used to the trance, and of course with what you call the normal waking state, and has not happened to become acquainted with this transition phase. He passes through it so quickly as a rule. As a transitional step, it is most necessary. Otherwise however it does not allow efficient behavior in any particular reality.
quotes.translation: 我建议我们的朋友在我们结束这里后出去散个步，快走的那种。情况完全不必惊慌。他一直习惯于出神状态，当然也熟悉你们所谓的正常清醒状态，只是碰巧尚未熟悉这个过渡阶段。通常他穿越这个阶段的速度极快。作为过渡步骤，它极为必要。否则，它将无法在任何特定实相中实现有效运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now. Ruburt was in a splendid state of dissociation. He was also emotionally and intuitively attuned because of his father's visit, and in an inner state of irritability, meaning excitability, which often accompanies dissociation. There is an outer aloofness, but an inner sensitivity to different stimuli.
quotes.translation: 现在。鲁柏处于极佳的解离状态。由于他父亲的来访，他在情感和直觉上都处于调谐状态，内心处于一种易怒状态——即兴奋状态——这种状态常伴随解离而来。外在表现为疏离，但内在对不同刺激却异常敏感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I was not connected in this way with Seth's book, and had no awareness of the creative processes involved. I went into trance as I do for our regular sessions. Seth dictated the book through me, speaking through my lips. The creative work was so distant from me, that in this respect I could not call the product my own. I am, instead, given a complete product in Seth's book -- an excellent one -- for which I am, of course, exceedingly grateful.
quotes.translation: 我并未以这种方式与赛斯的书相连，也不清楚其中涉及的创作过程。我像往常进行定期课那样进入出神状态。赛斯通过我口述这本书，借我的嘴唇说话。创作工作与我如此疏离，以至于在这方面我无法称这作品为我自己的。相反，赛斯的书给了我一个完整的成品——一本极好的作品——对此我当然万分感激。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: （l have long been aware that the yoga exercises have a powerful effect on me personally, and that I evidently end up in a dissociated state at times after doing them. I have neither encouraged or discouraged this effect. I have had the experience of hearing voices before but have not asked Seth to comment. He did mention my hearing music recently. The last time I heard voices they chattered away at a great rate, like a tape played too fast.
quotes.translation: （我早已意识到瑜伽练习对我个人有强烈影响，显然有时做完后我会进入解离状态。我既未鼓励也未阻止这种效应。我曾有过听见声音的经历，但未请赛斯评论。他最近确实提到我听见音乐的事。上次我听见声音时，它们以极快的速度喋喋不休，就像快放的录音带。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Dissociation puts the power back where it belongs. Ruburt's seemingly impractical suggestions in the past have been much more practical than some of your intellectual so-called practical conclusions. At the time Ruburt felt intuitively the importance of dissociation but didn't know how to achieve it.
quotes.translation: 解离将力量归还其应属之处。鲁柏过去那些看似不切实际的建议，比你们某些理智上所谓务实的结论要务实得多。当时鲁柏凭直觉感受到解离的重要性，却不知如何达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Here we will most probably run into some difficulty, but I will try to explain what I mean, and will clear up any questions later. As the self has an inner and an outer ego, so also does the inside finally become the outside. Theoretically for example, if followed through, a deep trance leading to a deeper inside so to speak, would bring you ultimately to another outside. The outer ego for example would meet the inner ego, and vice versa.
quotes.translation: （在此我们很可能会遇到一些困难，但我会尽力解释我的意思，稍后再澄清任何疑问。如同自我有内在与外在的自我，内在最终也会变成外在。例如，理论上来说，如果深入下去，可以说一个深度的出神状态会引导你进入更内在的层面，最终将你带到另一个外在。例如，外在的自我会遇到内在的自我，反之亦然。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: If you will remember what you know of the trance state, you are for example in a light trance, able to maintain awareness of yourself, your environment and your place in it. You simply behave somewhat differently, not bestirring yourself in any direction unless the suggestion to do so be given you.
quotes.translation: 若你记得对出神状态的了解，例如你处于轻度出神时，仍能保持对自身、环境及所处位置的觉知。你只是行为方式略有不同，除非接收到特定暗示，否则不会主动向任何方向行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: There are various types of dreams and dream fragments. I will follow this through also later, since in these beginning sessions I am giving you what may be considered a broad outline to be filled in. These dissociated states often occur in sleep, an excellent time since the ego is quieted. At such times it is extremely possible for present personalities to be visited by others such as myself, but only on the bidding of the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 梦境与梦的片段存在多种类型。我稍后也会对此进行深入探讨，因为在初期课程中，我正为你们提供可视为待填充的粗略框架。这些解离状态常发生于睡眠中——这是极佳时机，因自我已趋于平静。此时，现世人格极有可能被如我这般的存在造访，但唯有在存有本身的授意下才能实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Dissociation, and I will give you further training along this line, will enable you to bear your parents and to help them. Without it you cannot help them, and sometimes even add to their burdens. You have developed somewhat in this area lately on your own, and with Ruburt's help. From you Ruburt has received and is receiving necessary aids in self-discipline and control, which are necessary to channel the strong intuitional abilities.
quotes.translation: 解离状态，我将在这方面给予你们进一步训练，将使你们能够承受父母并帮助他们。没有它你们无法帮助他们，有时甚至会加重他们的负担。你们最近在这方面已有所发展，部分靠你们自己，部分借助鲁柏的帮助。从你们这里，鲁柏已经并正在接受自律与掌控的必要协助，这些对于疏导强烈的直觉能力是必需的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: However, we return again to the fact which neither of us can afford to ignore. We are each in a trance, you and I, （louder） but the focus of attention is within different fields. We speak with distortions. The material which I have already given will explain most clearly many ideas which are absolutely basic, for unless these ideas are clearly understood, then （louder） you will have no logical reason to accept anything that I say.
quotes.translation: 然而，我们再次回到那个我们双方都不能忽视的事实：你我都处于出神状态，（提高音量）只是注意力聚焦在不同场域。我们的话语带着扭曲。我已提供的资料将最清晰地解释许多绝对基础的概念——除非这些概念被透彻理解，（提高音量）否则你们将没有任何逻辑理由接受我所说的任何话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The outer senses are dulled, but the inner senses have not yet been turned on. The state is an unhappy one, where sharpness of perception is extremely limited. I am speaking at length about it because its lethargy could be harmful under certain circumstances. All the more so since the obvious, more noticeable symptoms of the trance state itself are absent; and therefore the state could pass unnoticed for some time.
quotes.translation: 外在感官变得迟钝，但内在感官尚未开启。这种状态令人不快，感知的敏锐度极度受限。我之所以详细讨论它，是因为其昏沉状态在某些情况下可能有害。尤其因为出神状态本身明显、更易察觉的症状在此缺失，因此这种状态可能在一段时间内未被察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Dissociation will blot out negative suggestions and is extremely beneficial. Nor is it difficult to achieve. It was impossible, Joseph, for your parents to even be decent when you returned from Florida for the same reason that you and Ruburt were unable to help your Mischa in his time of need. You were using all available energies to fight nervous projections, and therefore could not help maintain what was real.
quotes.translation: 解离状态会屏蔽负面暗示，具有极大益处，且不难达到。约瑟夫，你从佛罗里达回来时，你父母甚至无法保持体面，这与你和鲁柏在米沙需要帮助时无法施以援手是同一原因——你们正用所有可用能量对抗神经投射，因此无法维系真实的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now. This psychological framework is the medium through which we can communicate. It is purely a psychic organization that telepathically transmits concepts from me to Ruburt. We have always preferred the light trance state over a deeper trance for several reasons.
quotes.translation: 现在。这个心理架构是我们得以沟通的媒介。它纯粹是一种心灵组织，通过心电感应将概念从我传递至鲁柏。我们始终偏好轻度出神状态而非深度出神，原因如下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: He has fought me a good deal of the time. However this is also to his benefit and to yours. We do not want any willy-nilly trance states, spontaneous or undisciplined. He knows what he is doing. You have been negligent this past week, and yet this also adds to your confidence, in that you know that it is up to you both ultimately, and not ultimately up to me, whether or not these sessions are held.
quotes.translation: 他在大部分时间里都在与我抗争。然而，这对他和你们都有好处。我们不想要任何随意出神的状态，无论是自发的还是无纪律的。他知道自己在做什么。过去这一周你有所疏忽，但这反而增加了你的信心，因为你知道这些课程能否进行，最终取决于你们两人，而不是取决于我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In such circumstances these perceptions may find their way to the ego, appearing as inspirations or intuitive thought. It is obvious that many such intuitions appear when the personality is in a dreaming state or in states of dissociation. The intuitions themselves, while seemingly mental, are action, and as such they produce changes in the physical organism, both chemical and electromagnetic.
quotes.translation: 在此类情境下，这些感知可能以灵感或直觉思维的形式抵达自我意识。显然，许多此类直觉出现在人格处于梦境状态或解离状态时。这些直觉本身虽看似属于心智层面，实则是行动，因此会在物质有机体内产生化学与电磁层面的改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: (So we talked about this for a few minutes. Then suddenly I was in a very deep trance of which I have no memory--except at the very end, when I was yelling my lungs out, and I believe, flat on the floor crying. What I said I don't know now, though apparently at the end I was reliving some suicide attempt of Bars? Or an operation？Wouldn't know: it was supposed to be afternoon I do recall that.
quotes.translation: （于是我们对此讨论了几分钟。接着我突然陷入极深的出神状态，对此毫无记忆——除了最后时刻，我正声嘶力竭地吼叫，而且我相信自己正趴在地板上哭泣。我现在不知道当时说了什么，尽管显然在最后阶段，我是在重温巴斯的某次自杀尝试？还是手术？无从知晓：只记得那应该是下午时分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You will need to use your wits carefully, for secondary realities will often appear to be primaries. I mentioned earlier that it might seem that walking, for example, was a primary, since it appears that you walk in your dreams. You also walk in the waking state, and you can actually walk, and also appear to walk, in the trance state. Nevertheless, walking is part of the primary of motion.
quotes.translation: 你们需要谨慎运用智慧，因为次要实相往往看似主要实相。我之前提过，例如行走看似主要实相，因为你们在梦中也会行走。你们在清醒状态也会行走，而在出神状态中，你们既能实际行走，也能看似在行走。然而，行走仍是运动主要实相的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: A trip of course was the easiest method and Ruburt hit upon it. Daily methods of dissociation are extremely practical and beneficial. You will notice within a few week's time, if not sooner, an added energy. So-called impulses on your part are often quelled because your ego finds them impractical. The subconscious knows its own meat and sauce, and the best means for its own nourishment.
quotes.translation: 旅行当然是最简单的方法，鲁柏恰好想到了这点。日常的出神方法极为实用且有益。你们会在几周内（甚至更早）注意到精力增加。你们所谓的冲动常被压抑，因为自我认为它们不切实际。潜意识知道自己的养分，也知道滋养自己的最佳方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: You must dissociate yourself from the person that you know. Close your eyes. Imagine anything that you like that is pleasant to you. It makes no difference what it is. Then imagine yourself stepping apart from yourself in whatever way you choose. And then imagine that all about you there is another dimension and you need only take one step at a time... and you will find your answers.
quotes.translation: 你必须与你所认识的自己解离。闭上眼睛。想象任何令你愉悦的事物，内容无关紧要。然后想象自己以任何你选择的方式从自身抽离。接着想象你周围存在另一个维度，你只需一次迈出一步……你便会找到答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: I was pleased with the trance state that you achieved when you visited your dentist. And when you can do this under that stress, you see that you can also do it in other situations. With your parents for example you can use this knowledge, so that their actions will not upset you unduly. With them you simply need the suggestion that you will only react to constructive suggestions.
quotes.translation: 我很满意你在牙医诊所时达到的出神状态。既然能在那种压力下做到这点，你便明白自己同样能在其他情境中运用此能力。例如面对父母时，你可运用这份认知，使他们的行为不再过度困扰你。对他们你只需暗示自己：只对建设性建议产生反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: （Friday 6/5, 9:30 PM: I tried this session without deliberately inducing the light trance state. Saw a little girl in a short dress kicking up the dust in a gutter beside a curb; making the dust fly quite diligently. Also heard some popular music. I was snapped out of the desired state several times by a shouting voice, unrecognized. Also several other vague glimpses and sounds.
quotes.translation: （6月5日周五晚9点30分：我尝试未刻意诱导轻度出神状态进行本次课程。看见穿短裙的小女孩在路边排水沟踢起尘土，勤奋地扬起漫天飞尘。同时听见流行音乐声。被陌生喊叫声打断理想状态数次。另瞥见数段模糊影像与声响。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Ruburt helped me in producing that voice that he himself heard, simply because of certain electromagnetic alterations that occur within the trance state; and Ruburt was in a trance state upon the specific occasion of which I was speaking.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏协助我发出他自己也听见的那个声音，这仅仅是因为出神状态中发生的特定电磁变化；而在我所说的那个特定场合，鲁柏正处于出神状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It would do no harm to purchase a thermometer, taking Ruburt's temperature before, after and during some sessions. Anything that you learn is to your benefit along these lines, and will serve us all well. The thermometer could also be used of course to test any temperature changes occurring in a regular trance state. These are merely suggestions which I feel may be of benefit.
quotes.translation: 购买一支温度计，在几次课的前、中、后测量鲁柏的体温，不会有任何坏处。你在这方面的任何发现都将对你有利，并对我们所有人都有帮助。当然，这支温度计也可用于测试常规出神状态中发生的任何温度变化。这些只是我觉得可能有益的简单建议。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: All of your attention is focused in a highly specialized way upon one shining, bright point that you call reality. There are other realities all about you, but you ignore their existence, and you blot out all stimuli that come from them. There is a reason for such a trance, as you will discover, but little by little you must wake up. My purpose is to open your inner eyes.
quotes.translation: 你们所有的注意力都以一种高度专门化的方式，聚焦于一个你们称之为现实的明亮光点上。你们周围存在着其他实相，但你们忽视了它们的存在，并屏蔽了来自这些实相的所有刺激。这种出神状态自有其存在的理由，你们终将发现这一点，但你们必须逐渐醒来。我的目的是开启你们的内在之眼。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The tree is of course dissociated in one manner. In some ways its living forces and consciousness are kept to a minimum. It is in a state of drowsiness on the one hand, and on the other hand it focuses the usable portion of its energy into being a tree. The state of consciousness involved here is dull as compared to the highly differentiated human ability in many ways.
quotes.translation: 树木当然在某种程度上是解离的。在某些方面，其生命力和意识被保持在最低限度。它一方面处于昏睡状态，另一方面将可用的能量集中用于成为一棵树。与人类高度分化的能力相比，这里的意识状态在许多方面都显得迟钝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I was not pressing the point, as I was with the gallery suggestion. Ruburt will improve, and is improving, as far as distortions are concerned; because, again, we are not using a deep trance state, because we are working in cooperation. The process may take longer but it is much more advantageous in the long run, and you forget that this is only the very beginning.
quotes.translation: 我并非像对画廊建议那样坚持己见。鲁柏在扭曲方面将有所改善，且正在改善；因为再次强调，我们并未使用深度出神状态，而是以合作方式进行。这个过程可能耗时更长，但从长远来看更为有利，而你们忽略了这仅仅是个开端。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: （This is but the beginning. Today I listened for the noise again but heard nothing. I then continued putting myself in a light trance, suggesting that my subconscious would give me an experiment that would prove the validity of clairvoyance, premonition or prediction for the chapter I was working on. I was thinking in terms of an experiment for the reader to try.
quotes.translation: （这仅仅是个开始。今天我再次倾听那噪音，却一无所获。接着我继续让自己进入轻度出神状态，暗示我的潜意识会给我一个实验，证明我正在撰写的章节中关于千里眼、预感或预知的有效性。我当时正考虑设计一个让读者尝试的实验。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The pendulum is an excellent manner for reaching the personal layers of the subconscious. Unless a trance state is adopted, it is much less effective as a manner of reaching those layers that lie, so to speak, beneath the personal subconscious. For practical purposes it is excellent policy to check often with the personal subconscious through use of the pendulum.
quotes.translation: 钟摆是触及个人潜意识层的绝佳方式。除非采用出神状态，否则它作为触及所谓个人潜意识之下的那些层次的方法，效果会大打折扣。就实用目的而言，通过使用钟摆经常与个人潜意识核对是极好的策略。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You cannot now do this physically, but you can do this through the use of the inner senses, trance states, hypnosis experiences, and intelligent use of the intuitions and imaginative powers. The universe is transparent to the inner senses. It is transparent functionally. It exists electromagnetically. All realities within it exist in their own band of intensity.
quotes.translation: 你现在无法在物质层面做到这点，但可以通过运用内在感官、出神状态、催眠体验，以及明智运用直觉和想象力来达成。宇宙对内在感官而言是透明的。它在功能上是透明的，以电磁形态存在。其中的所有实相都存在于各自的强度波段中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I do depend upon Ruburt's willingness to dissociate.12 There is no doubt that at times he is unaware of his surroundings during a session. However, this is no more binding upon him than autosuggestion. It is a phenomenon in which he gives consent, and he could, at any time and in a split second, return his conscious attention upon his physical environment.
quotes.translation: 我确实依赖鲁柏愿意出神的状态。12 毫无疑问，他在课程进行中有时会意识不到周遭环境。然而，这对他而言并不比自我暗示更具约束力。这是一种他给予同意的现象，他随时都能在瞬间将意识注意力转回物质环境。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Since matter does disintegrate, or seems to, you take it for granted that this dissolution is inherent within it, but this is not the case. The focus of energy that organizes the physical body weakens, strays; the trance state, strongest at what you call early adulthood, begins to lose its hold even as in childhood it has not yet attained its full depth.
quotes.translation: 既然物质确实会崩解，或者说看似如此，你们便理所当然地认为这种瓦解是物质固有的特性，但事实并非如此。组织物质身体的那个能量焦点会减弱、游离；在你们所谓的青年期达到最强状态的出神状态，开始失去其掌控力，正如在童年时期它尚未达到完全深度一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There will be no complications resulting from such a meeting of an adverse nature, if you feared this. Some good contacts would be made. They will be made in any case. Ruburt should not plan to do trance work. (As suggested by Reverend C., on stage.) His main energies remain with the material. He is an excellent teacher however, and a good speaker.
quotes.translation: 如果你们担心这种负面性质的聚会会产生并发症，那大可不必。实际上会建立一些良好的联系。无论如何这些联系都会建立。鲁柏不应计划进行出神工作（如C牧师建议的舞台形式）。他的主要精力仍应放在资料上。不过他是位优秀的教师和出色的演说家。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The individuals receiving such knowledge already are capable of understanding it, and their own inner ego helps them in this comprehension. I have been against the deep trance for this reason, in that I prefer to work with you in such a manner that you are able to use this knowledge consciously, and also feel that you have a part in its delivery.
quotes.translation: 接收这类知识的个人，本身已具备理解它的能力，而他们自己的内在自我会协助他们领悟。正因如此，我一向反对深层出神状态，因为我更倾向于以这样的方式与你合作：让你能有意识地运用这些知识，同时也感受到自己在传递过程中扮演了角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This has something to do with Ruburt's difficulty in breaking the trance state. (Pause.) From someone else here... Your figures, to get the feeling of depth and breadth, this is not to get the feeling simply of the flesh and bone within the flesh, but to suggest the personal energy and vitality that is in a riot, to be loose within the flesh.
quotes.translation: 这与鲁柏难以脱离出神状态有关。（停顿。）从这里的另一个人身上……你们的人物形象，要获得深度和广度的感受，这并非仅仅为了感受血肉之躯内的骨骼，而是为了暗示那在血肉中奔放不羁的个人能量与活力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: In all probability there will be some failures, but there will be many successes, and the fear of failure will be our worst inhibiting factor. On a few occasions, with Ruburt's growing training and with his consent, and with yours, we may have to try a somewhat deeper trance state, but this would only be occasionally, and with your consent.
quotes.translation: 大概率会出现些许失败，但成功次数将更多，而对失败的恐惧才是我们最大的阻碍。偶尔，随着鲁柏训练精进，经他本人及你们同意后，我们或需尝试稍深的出神状态——但这仅属特例，且必先征得你们首肯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I realize only too well that reincarnation is a shady subject by far, most unpopular. I assure you however that in any discussion with your psychologists on this matter, I shall hold my own. Again, the attention, the energy of all human personalities, as a rule, are severely focused in one scope of reality only. They are indeed in a trance.
quotes.translation: 我太清楚轮回是个备受争议的课题，极不受欢迎。但我向你们保证，在与贵方心理学家讨论此事时，我自会坚持立场。再次强调，所有人类人格的注意力与能量，通常都严重聚焦于单一实相范畴。他们确实处于出神状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: When this material begins to tally, when under trance many of the same answers are received, when it is discovered that the knowledge of the basic universe is contained within the living individual, and when there is no doubt that the solutions given are the same, then and only then will you begin to solve the problems that are before you.
quotes.translation: 当这些资料开始相互印证，当在出神状态下收到许多相同的答案，当发现活生生的个体内蕴藏着对基本宇宙的认知，当提供的解答毫无二致时，唯有此时，你们才能着手解决眼前的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I have been with you this evening in a manner which has not been possible lately. We have been involved in variations of the trance state, while at the same time anxious to continue our material, so that the two ventures have been tied into one. It has taken me a while indeed before we could reach this point of more intimate communication.
quotes.translation: 今晚我一直以一种近来未能实现的方式与你们同在。我们一直参与在出神状态的各种变化中，同时急于继续我们的资料，因此这两项尝试已合而为一。确实花了我一段时间，我们才达到这种更亲密沟通的境地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: If you have already suggested that the table does not exist for him, he will never see the table. The table will not seem to exist. The table will not exist in actuality for this subject in the trance state. It ceases to have any meaning for him at all. Nor will he recall or remember any meaning for him that that table might once have had.
quotes.translation: 如果你已经暗示那张桌子对他而言不存在，他将永远不会看到那张桌子。那张桌子似乎将不存在。对于处于出神状态的这个受试者而言，那张桌子在现实中也将不存在。它对他而言完全失去了任何意义。他也不会回忆起或记得那张桌子曾经对他可能具有的任何意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Hypnosis is at best a poor tool. A light trance state, self induced, can yield excellent results in a subject who is trained along these lines. Later we will go into other experiments. As I have said, so-called space travel will be mainly divorced from vehicles, and the use of psychological time is the very first step in this direction.
quotes.translation: 催眠充其量只是拙劣的工具。自我诱导的轻度出神状态，在受过此类训练的受试者身上能产生极佳效果。稍后我们将探讨其他实验。如我所言，所谓的太空旅行主要将脱离载具，而运用心理时间正是迈向此方向的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: In a trance state the electromagnetic aura that surrounds and is a part of the physical body, changes. The changes can be perceived through the use of several instruments, and by some individuals without instruments. A certain instability is set up electromagnetically that allows the individual to handle greater frequencies and ranges.
quotes.translation: 在出神状态下，环绕并构成肉体一部分的电磁能量场会发生改变。这些改变可以通过几种仪器感知，某些人无需仪器也能察觉。电磁层面会建立某种不稳定性，使个体能够处理更高的频率和范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: （We began talking in the living room. I mentioned being able to put myself in a dissociated state at the gallery when things got sticky, and said this saved lots of effort on my part. My voice seemed to get hoarse and husky as I spoke; I laughed and commented that I hoped Seth wasn't going to start using my voice when he wanted to.
quotes.translation: （我们在客厅开始交谈。我提到在画廊遇到棘手情况时，能让自己进入解离状态，并说这替我省了不少力气。说话时我的声音似乎变得沙哑低沉；我笑着补充说，希望赛斯不要在他想说话时擅自借用我的声音。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: My affection for you Joseph is extremely strong. If I speak heavy-handedly it is because I want you to have a light touch. Dissociation actually is a stronger unity with the creative aspects of your personality. It puts you back, or it puts your creative talents back, in the drivers seat. As yet you have no idea how strong you are.
quotes.translation: 我对你的感情约瑟夫极为深厚。若我说话显得笨拙，是因为希望你能举重若轻。解离实际上是与人格创造性面向更强烈的合一。它让你——或者说让你的创造才能——重新坐上驾驶座。你至今仍不清楚自己有多强大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I suggest you take a short break. Reread the material and I will continue. And if it seems I am lighting into you while leaving Ruburt more or less unbothered and intact, it is only because Ruburt's particular disagreeable early circumstances made dissociation a necessity for survival, and therefore it was learned at an early age.
quotes.translation: 我建议你稍作休息。重读这些资料后我会继续。若我似乎对你严加指摘，却对鲁柏几乎毫发无伤，那仅是因为鲁柏早年特殊的不愉快处境，使得解离成为生存必需，因此他在幼年便习得了这项能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is more aggressive than receptive, in contrast to some other trance states that are used to receive, rather than go out after, information. (Long pause.) It pierces, opening up dimensions through which the consciousness can then perceive events or on occasion travel through the dimension to experience the events more directly.
quotes.translation: 这种状态比接受性更具侵略性，与某些用于接收而非主动追寻信息的出神状态截然不同。（长停顿）它穿透并开启维度，使意识得以感知事件，有时甚至能穿越维度更直接地体验事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: He is still dependent upon it symbolically, however, generally speaking. The inner ego however can be utilized in such a dissociated state as such a director of activities, with sufficient training. I must emphasize that indeed years of training are required. But then the experience is ten times more rewarding and informative.
quotes.translation: 然而，一般来说，他在象征意义上仍然依赖它。但通过足够的训练，内在自我可以在这种出神状态下被用作活动的指挥者。我必须强调，确实需要多年的训练。不过，这种体验的回报和信息量将是十倍以上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Consciously you didn't know what you were up to but unconsciously you knew very well. This sort of dissociated state can be dangerous, particularly induced haphazardly as was certainly the case with you. If I had not happened to look in you would have been in a great state for the rest of the evening, or should I say morning.
quotes.translation: 你有意识地不知道自己在做什么，但无意识中却非常清楚。这种解离状态可能很危险，尤其是像你这样随意诱发的情况。要不是我碰巧看了一眼，你整个晚上——或者说凌晨——都会处于糟糕的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Hypnosis is not generally understood in its true light. The hypnotist is not necessary except as a director; and indeed in most cases such a director is necessary. But the hypnotic state is simply a level of awareness in which the personality is freewheeling, so to speak, dissociated from physical reality in its usual terms.
quotes.translation: 催眠通常未以真实面目被理解。催眠师并非必要，除非作为引导者；事实上在大多数情况下，这样的引导者是必要的。但催眠状态只是一种意识层次，在此状态下人格可以说是自由运转的，与通常意义上的物质实相解离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: There is not much, therefore, that I can say. But you have both progressed enough in your understanding that the situation should pass without too much difficulty. I would certainly say more if it were possible, but outside of knocking Ruburt over the head, or putting him in a deep trance, there is really little I can say.
quotes.translation: 因此，我能说的不多。但你们俩的理解都已进步到足以让这种情况不太困难地过去。如果可能，我当然会说更多，但除了敲打鲁柏的脑袋，或让他进入深度出神状态外，我实在没什么可说的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now when you leave one form for the other, it of course is in the trance state. This applies to other forms beside the physical. You may look back upon it and think it a dead image of yourself, you see. Some individuals in their first astral form see their physical bodies as dead images of themselves and become frightened.
quotes.translation: 当你离开一种形态进入另一种形态时，当然会处于出神状态。这同样适用于物质形态之外的其他形态。你可能会回顾它，认为那是自己的一具死寂影像，你看。有些人在他们的第一个星光体形态中，会看到自己的物质身体如同死寂的影像，因而感到恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You will find that the sort of focus, the particularized focus achieved in the free contemplation and enjoyment of nature, is a welcome change from the dissociated focus aimed at to some degree in psychic pursuits. If possible I suggest that Ruburt forget until after vacation all problems, concerning his job or a new one.
quotes.translation: 你会发现，在自由观照与享受自然时所达到的那种专注、那种特定聚焦，与灵性追求中某种程度上刻意为之的游离式聚焦相比，是一种令人愉悦的转变。如果可能，我建议鲁柏在假期结束前忘掉所有关于他工作或新工作的烦恼。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: （Friday morning after writing for two hours, suddenly I felt very sleepy and could hardly hold my eyes open. Since I never take naps in the morning I tried to continue working but finally gave up, and went to bed. At the time I wondered about the peculiar sleepiness, wondering if it had any connection with a trance state.
quotes.translation: （周五早上写了两个小时后，突然感到非常困倦，几乎睁不开眼睛。由于我从不午睡，我试图继续工作，但最终还是放弃了，上床睡觉。当时我对这种奇怪的困倦感到疑惑，想知道它是否与出神状态有关。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You can enter a trance state in any form, you see. The time element is important when you project from the physical image. It becomes less important the further away you get from the physical form. Since all of these selves are simultaneous, it is also possible to project yourself into one of your own previous identities.
quotes.translation: 你看，你可以任何形态进入恍惚状态。当从物质形象投射时，时间要素至关重要。离物质形态越远，其重要性就越低。由于所有这些自我都是同时存在的，你甚至可能投射到自己的某个前世身份中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: With deep trance the conscious outer state is completely switched off. Knowledge is forcibly poured down the imaginary gullet, and I can't feel very enthusiastic over such a method. What we are doing may be slower on your terms, but the effects are more durable and the whole self is aware of any knowledge thus received.
quotes.translation: 在深度出神状态下，外在意识完全关闭。知识被强行灌入想象的食道，我对这种方法实在提不起热情。我们正在做的按你们的时间标准可能较慢，但效果更持久，整个自我都能意识到如此接收的任何知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: （After that her dissociation is deeper and more secure, she said, and she is not so afraid of mistakes or distortions. For my part, considering the recent success concerning the material involving Bill Macdonnel, I wanted to get as much information as I could on John this evening so that we could check against it later.
quotes.translation: （此后她说她的出神状态更深更稳固，不再那么害怕出错或扭曲。就我而言，考虑到最近涉及比尔·麦克唐纳资料的成功，我今晚想尽可能多地获取关于约翰的信息，以便日后核对。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: （I felt as if I were heading into a very deep trance state of some sort, which I was fighting off. And yet I thought that I was supposed to be experimenting, and was tempted to go along with it. Fear got the best of me. While I stopped myself from going into a deeper state, I wasn't able to snap out of what I was in.
quotes.translation: （我感觉自己正陷入某种极深的出神状态，本能地抗拒着。但转念一想，这本该是实验的一部分，便想顺其自然。最终恐惧占了上风。虽然我阻止自己进入更深的状态，却也无法从当前状态中挣脱出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: And yet you had the nerve to suggest that I played a part. Trickery is not one of my qualities, at least not trickery of that type, so you need have no worries on that score. The state of dissociation that you reached can be used most effectively. You however blundered into it all unaware and unprepared. For shame.
quotes.translation: 然而你竟有胆量暗示我在演戏。欺骗并非我的特质，至少不是那种类型的欺骗，所以你大可不必为此担忧。你所达到的解离状态可以非常有效地运用。但你却是在毫无察觉、毫无准备的情况下误打误撞进入的。真是可耻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Because the father freezes emotion in the ritual of fussy compulsion he is actually less dangerous in some ways and more dangerous in others, since the compulsive framework always threatens to explode. Again, dissociation is not only your best weapon but also your most helpful tool in helping both of your parents.
quotes.translation: 由于父亲在繁琐强迫的仪式中冻结了情感，他在某些方面危险性较低，但在另一些方面危险性更高，因为强迫性框架始终有爆发的威胁。再次强调，解离不仅是你们最好的武器，也是帮助你们双亲的最有用的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: As a rule body temperature, after certain preliminary stages, is lowered during Ruburt's trance state. The heat therefore can mitigate against us at times. All communications depend upon inner electromagnetic manipulations in any case, even for example mental images, and body temperature is also related here.
quotes.translation: 通常来说，鲁柏的出神状态在经过某些初步阶段后，体温会降低。因此，体温有时会妨碍我们的运作。所有沟通本质上都依赖内在的电磁操控，例如心像也是如此，而体温与此也有关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The necessary focus point may be achieved through trance, hypnosis or self-hypnosis, or through certain other disciplines. It may happen spontaneously, as when a severe emotional reaction is set off; through external circumstances, and what Ruburt has read in the past along these lines is partially correct.
quotes.translation: 必要的焦点可以通过出神、催眠或自我催眠，或通过某些其他训练达成。它也可能自发发生，比如当强烈的情绪反应被触发时；通过外部环境，鲁柏过去在这方面读到的东西部分正确。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Many people are unable to endow fragments with such physical reality, and thus shove them more or less harmlessly away at arm's length. It is as if in Ruburt's great experience the other night that the dissociated part of the personality donned another identity and battled with Ruburt's own for dominance.
quotes.translation: 许多人无法赋予片段人格如此具体的物质实相，因而能将其或多或少无害地推离到一臂之遥。仿佛在鲁柏那晚的非凡体验中，人格中解离的部分披上了另一重身份，与鲁柏自身争夺主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I want to mention the difference also in experience and sensation, between a projection that begins in the dream state, and one that begins in a trance state, and also to discuss what Ruburt calls awake-seeming dreams, for there are several points here that you do not know, and they are fairly important.
quotes.translation: 我想提一下，在梦境状态中开始的投射，与在出神状态中开始的投射，两者在体验和感受上的差异。同时也要讨论鲁柏所谓的“看似清醒的梦境”，因为其中有几个你们尚不了解的要点，且相当重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Your room dividers are even beneficial from this standpoint. Incense is good from two standpoints; of negative ions from smoke, and also because scent, smelling itself, has an electrical reality. Semidarkness merely aids in dissociation and concentration, and the lessening of camouflage data is helpful.
quotes.translation: 从这角度来看，你的房间隔板甚至是有益的。香薰在两方面都有好处：烟雾产生的负离子，以及气味本身具有的电磁实相。半明半暗的环境有助于解离与专注，减少伪装信息的干扰也很有帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Others are perceived in glimpses or bits and pieces by your temporal mind while you are half-sleeping and half-waking, or in other periods of dissociation. There are various kinds of multidimensional art, and therefore many levels in which the creators work. The whole Christ story was such a creation.
quotes.translation: 其他存在是在你半睡半醒时，或在其他解离状态下，被你凡俗心智以片段或零碎的方式感知到的。多维艺术有多种形式，因此创作者工作的层面也各不相同。整个基督故事就是这样的一个创作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: （While Bill Gallagher was putting on his hat and coat at 10 PM tonight, preparatory to leaving our apartment for the bus terminal, I wrote down two impressions of headlines. I was not in a trance state. Bill did not see these until he returned at 10:35 PM; he told me both of them were incorrect.
quotes.translation: （今晚十点，比尔·加拉格尔正在穿帽子和外套准备离开我们的公寓前往公交总站时，我写下了两个头条印象。我并非处于出神状态。比尔直到晚上十点三十五分返回后才看到这些；他告诉我两者都不正确。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In a deep trance we could tell you much, Ruburt and I, but I still agree on the principles of cooperation, and always follow the dictates of caution. Ruburt's abilities along these lines are great, but it is necessary always that certain controls are maintained; and he certainly sees to that!
quotes.translation: 在深度出神状态中，鲁柏和我能告诉你许多事，但我仍秉持合作原则，始终遵循谨慎的指引。鲁柏在这方面的能力很强大，但必须维持某些控制；而他确实做到了这一点！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is advantageous to take our opportunity when possible at such times. I have been strict concerning our schedule, since conditioning must be set up, and while we always allowed for some spontaneity, it was necessary that Ruburt develop greater efficiency in his handling of the trance state.
quotes.translation: 趁此机会把握时机是有利的。我一直严格遵循我们的时间表，因为必须建立条件反射，虽然我们始终保留一些自发性，但鲁柏有必要在掌握出神状态方面发展出更高的效率。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: A deeper trance state would allow us to get less distorted information on such a test as this, initially, but our results will improve, and such experiments will be helpful in that the various layers of the two personalities, Ruburt's and my own, will be seen in their operating procedures.
quotes.translation: 更深层的出神状态起初能让我们在这类测试中获得失真较少的信息，但我们的成果会逐步提升，这类实验的益处在于，鲁柏与我两个人格的不同层面将在其运作过程中得以显现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The answers here are reliable, generally speaking. Underline the generally. You are reaching deeper layers of the personality as you progress with the pendulum. Ruburt could put himself in a light trance state before a session, and you could ask the questions while he holds the pendulum.
quotes.translation: 一般而言，这些答案是可靠的。请特别注意"一般而言"这个说法。随着你使用摆锤的进展，你正在触及人格的更深处层面。鲁柏可以在课前让自己进入轻度出神状态，而你可以在他手持摆锤时提出问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: We are dealing here with something rather unusual (the tests), in that we are attempting to permit two personalities to exist side by side, so to speak. Ruburt is not in a deep trance state. I do not supersede his own personality. He allows me, in our sessions, to coexist with himself.
quotes.translation: 我们在此处理的是相当不寻常的情况（这些测试），因为可以说，我们正试图允许两个人格并存。鲁柏并未处于深度出神状态。我并未取代他自身的人格。在我们的课程中，他允许我与他共存。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Ruburt does this in his own way also. The one who is at any given time free of such difficulty should indeed help the other when such occasions arise. You actually put yourself in a trance state, and the suggestions take strong hold; and they are rarely constructive ones at such times.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏也以自己的方式这么做。在任何时候，那个暂时摆脱这种困难的人，确实应该在类似情况发生时帮助另一个人。你实际上让自己进入了一种出神状态，而暗示会变得非常强烈；在这种时候，它们很少是建设性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It is the perspective in which psychic motion occurs. In hypnosis for example a trance is said to be light or deep. This corresponds somewhat to the kind of depth that is involved here. Unfortunately, when you think of depth you think in terms of a movement at once inward and outward.
quotes.translation: 这是心灵运动发生的视角。例如在催眠中，出神状态有浅深之分。这在一定程度上对应此处涉及的深度类型。遗憾的是，当你们想到深度时，总会同时联想到向内和向外的运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: A state of dissociation is necessary, a letting down of egotistical barriers in order that inner symbolisms can be appreciated and distinguished. The change of focus alone will aid in intuitional enlightenment, and association can then rise more easily through the subconscious areas.
quotes.translation: 出神状态是必要的，放下自我障碍，以便内在象征得以被辨识与欣赏。仅凭焦点的转移就能助益直觉性启发，而联想也能更轻易地通过潜意识区域浮现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In much the same manner, existence within the physical universe involves the most intense self-hypnotic trance, where attention becomes riveted and focused along certain lines while other realities are of necessity closed out of one's perception and comprehension for a certain while.
quotes.translation: 以极为相似的方式，物质宇宙中的存在涉及最强烈的自我催眠出神状态——此时注意力被牢牢锁定并聚焦于特定方向，而其他实相必然在特定时期内被排除在感知与理解之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I should clarify this perhaps by saying that the split was a split of the entire subconscious. In Ruburt's case last January 10th the split was of the conscious level. Since Ruburt was unaware of causing the dissociation to begin with, he was unable to find his blundering way out.
quotes.translation: 我或许该这样澄清：那分裂是整个潜意识的分离。就鲁柏去年1月10日的情况而言，分裂发生在意识层面。由于鲁柏最初并未意识到自己引发了这种解离，他无法找到笨拙的出路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It can also be used in healing, when it is developed. Without realizing it Ruburt has had several other very brief experiences with this kind of trance in the past. In those instances a necessary familiarity was achieved, though the results in terms of information were negligible.
quotes.translation: 当这种能力发展成熟时，也可用于疗愈。鲁柏过去曾有过数次极短暂的类似出神体验，虽未产生显著的信息成果，却已建立起必要的熟悉感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The light of fire has a soothing effect upon his nervous system, a relaxing effect. Not only fire is involved here, however. There is a tendency for spontaneous dissociation that has always been characteristic, and this tendency is simply given freedom when he stares into flames.
quotes.translation: 火光对他的神经系统有舒缓作用，能产生放松效果。但这里涉及的不仅是火。他向来有自发解离的倾向，当他凝视火焰时，这种倾向只是获得了释放的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: You can hear the chair as a musical note in a trance state, for example, or with the use of drugs. You are still dealing in terms of your senses, however. You are seeing or perceiving, ratherseparately, the various components that are usually organized to form the solid object.
quotes.translation: 例如，在出神状态或使用药物时，你可以将椅子听成一个音符。然而，你仍在感官的范畴内运作。你是在分别地看见或感知那些通常被组织起来形成固体物体的各种成分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: There was a very slight connection with your own parents, however, in that Ruburt mentioned the dentist and the trance to them at their latest visit here. And a secondary connection with a car--not close, not a close connection--in which your parents traveled on that occasion.
quotes.translation: 然而，与你的父母有一个非常微弱的关联——鲁柏在他们最近一次来访时向他们提到了牙医和出神状态。还有一个次要的关联与一辆车有关——不密切，不是密切的关联——你的父母那次旅行乘坐的就是那辆车。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: There are methods of course where the trance can be terminated gradually. It is not good to terminate that kind of trance too quickly.
quotes.translation: 当然，有些方法可以逐渐终止出神状态。但过快终止那种出神状态并不好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: As he almost discovered, such a trance is highly effective for projections. There is a more intense focus of concentration, high use of energy, a merging of capabilities, intent, direction, directly from the center of the self, that can be compared, properly used, to a laser.
quotes.translation: 他几乎发现，这种出神状态对投射极为有效。它带来更强烈的专注力、高强度的能量运用、能力、意图与方向的融合——若善加利用，可比拟激光般直接从自我核心迸发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In some trance stages however, you may become aware of these generic patterns, you see, project them outward, and think you are perceiving some strange apparition. This kind of experience could take place immediately before a projection, you see, though this is not usual.
quotes.translation: 然而在某些出神阶段，你可能会意识到这些通用模式，你看，将它们向外投射，并以为自己在感知某种奇怪的幻象。这种体验可能发生在投射之前，你看，尽管这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Because I have kept you without your break, I will now close the session. I did not want to break the context or the continuity here, and it was much better that Ruburt remain in a constant state of deep dissociation for the most faithful interpretation of the dreams.
quotes.translation: 既然我让你们错过了休息时间，现在就此结束课程。我不想在此打断语境或连续性，让鲁柏保持持续深度出神状态，对梦境进行最忠实的诠释会更好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: My field of reality is not the same as it is for those who have recently left your system. It is not necessary for Ruburt to adopt the deep trance state for our sessions, since I am able to speak through him without shutting out most aspects of his consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我的实相领域与那些刚离开你们系统的人不同。鲁柏无需为了我们的课进入深度出神状态，因为我能在不屏蔽他大部分意识的情况下通过他说话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The nature of reality can only be approached by an investigation of reality as it is directly experienced in all levels of awareness: reality as it appears under dream conditions, under other conditions of dissociation, and as it appears in the waking condition.
quotes.translation: 实相的本质只能通过直接检视意识所有层面所体验到的实相来探究：包括梦境状态下的实相、其他出神状态下的实相，以及清醒状态下的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: And added to this, the training will give you valuable information regarding the nature of dreams in general, the stages of the subconscious, and the inner life of the personality when it is dissociated from its physical environment to some considerable extent.
quotes.translation: 此外，这种训练将为你提供关于梦境本质、潜意识阶段以及人格在相当程度上脱离物质环境时的内在生活的宝贵信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Also, Ruburt has experienced and used dissociation, though to a lesser degree, before our communications; that is, in his work, and knows how to handle it. I do not want either of you to be worried. On the other hand, I don't want Ruburt to fight me, either.
quotes.translation: 此外，鲁柏在我们的通讯之前就体验并运用过解离，虽然程度较轻；也就是说，在他的工作中，他知道如何处理。我不希望你们任何一人担忧。另一方面，我也不希望鲁柏抗拒我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: This, again, is not to say that it is not real, but that it is not a primary reality that is more or less constant for the inner self. If an experience is a part of all levels of consciousness--this includes the trance state--then it is a primary experience.
quotes.translation: 这并非否定其真实性，而是说明它并非内在自我所感知的那种相对恒常的初级实相。若某个体验涉及所有意识层次——包括出神状态——那它便属于初级体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Caution is always intelligent action in such matters. Ruburt has been in enough of a trance as it is. However, even the action of speaking for me this session is beneficial, as far as he is concerned. That is why I held the session to begin with.
quotes.translation: 在此类事务中，谨慎始终是明智之举。鲁柏已经处于相当深的出神状态。然而，就他而言，即使是为我进行这场课业的行为也是有益的。这就是我一开始就举行这场课业的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is a litter of papers, however, that are not in sight in a drawer. He has forgotten about us until very late. He lies down. （Pause at 10:10.） He seems to be in a dissociated state, but whether or not it was produced purposely I do not know.
quotes.translation: 然而，抽屉里有一叠看不见的纸张。他很晚才想起我们。他躺下。（10:10分停顿。）他似乎处于出神状态，但我不清楚这是否是有意为之。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The light trance, again, is necessary only for a time, and theoretically it is not necessary at all. The only necessity here is that you permit yourself not to displace the ego, but more, to enable yourself to look within and past the ego.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，轻度出神状态只是暂时需要，理论上根本不必需要。这里唯一必要的是：你不仅允许自己不要取代自我，更要让自己能够向内观照并超越自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Perhaps we can lengthen it. However, I do not feel that Ruburt should remain in a trance state today, any longer than he already has. If our caution slows down the material, there is no need to worry about time. We have plenty of it.
quotes.translation: 也许我们可以延长它。不过，我觉得鲁柏今天不应该再继续处于出神状态了，他已经维持得够久了。如果我们的谨慎拖慢了资料的速度，也不必担心时间。我们有的是时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There must be an agreement on both of your parts or the session will suffer. Dissociation opens or makes available lines and possibilities of communication, but there is no necessity that they be used at any given time or instance.
quotes.translation: 你们双方必须达成协议，否则课程会受影响。出神状态开启或提供了沟通的线路与可能性，但并非必须在任何特定时间或场合使用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, our friend seldom attempts to block during a session as he did in the past. After a session in which he has been in a deep trance, a portion of him becomes leery, however. This is why we did not have our last session. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在，我们的朋友很少像过去那样在课程中试图阻挠。不过，在经历深度出神状态的课程后，他的一部分会变得警惕。这就是我们上次课程未能进行的原因。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: If Ruburt were going into very deep trance states such precautions would not be necessary. I prefer this sort of give and take however, which means that in many instances we must go slower, but we will be more sure of our results.
quotes.translation: 如果鲁柏要进入非常深的出神状态，这些预防措施就不必要了。不过我更喜欢这种有来有往的方式，这意味着在许多情况下我们必须放慢速度，但我们的结果会更有把握。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In the case of projection, this trance forms a safe channel through which the consciousness may travel and return. It is associated with the pyramid effect, usually going outward from the center of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 在投射案例中，这种出神状态形成一条安全通道，意识可经由其往返。它与金字塔效应相关联，通常从意识中心向外延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Ruburts experience in psychological time today represented a legitimate attempt to dissociate his awareness from physical matter, and was a sign that he is embarking upon another fruitful period of activity.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏今天在心理时间中的体验，代表了他试图将意识与物质实相解离的正当尝试，也是他正进入另一个丰硕活动期的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It is quite simple. At certain stages a state of dissociation is achieved with the indulgence of alcohol. This stage is reached by Ruburt without such indulgence, and it is this state that he recognizes.
quotes.translation: 这很简单。在某些阶段，借助酒精的放纵会达到一种解离状态。而鲁柏无需这种放纵就能达到此状态，这正是他所认知的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
